_note: Per-report PROSE overlay for the RWG directory, keyed by file basename (no extension). Entirely OPTIONAL and now intentionally minimal: every factual stat on a card (contracts, privileged fns, EOA holders, critical roles, control surface, proxy/upgradability, scan date) is read live from the report's own Markdown header by api/reports.js, so it never needs hand-maintaining here. This file only carries the analyst-authored prose the report does not contain: protocol, a one-line summary, the analyst review 'status' (reviewed | in-review | monitoring | parked), display name overrides (asset/subtitle), and 'order'. A report with no entry still appears, named from its own header.

DOLA.summary: Debt-backed USD stablecoin minted by FiRM Feds against collateral.

crvUSD.summary: Crypto-collateralized USD stablecoin with LLAMMA soft-liquidation.

scrvUSD.subtitle: Savings crvUSD (Yearn V3 Vault)
scrvUSD.summary: Savings crvUSD: an unmodified Yearn V3 vault accruing crvUSD yield.

USDe.summary: Synthetic dollar backed by a delta-neutral, off-chain-custodied basis position.

StakedUSDeV2.subtitle: StakedUSDeV2
StakedUSDeV2.summary: Staked USDe: an ERC-4626 vault distributing USDe protocol yield.

frxUSD.summary: Frax USD stablecoin backed by off-chain RWA custodians plus on-chain reserves.

sfrxUSD.summary: Staked frxUSD: an ERC-4626 vault distributing Frax yield.

rewardVault.subtitle: sd-DOLA-sUSDe (OnlyBoost v2)
rewardVault.summary: OnlyBoost v2 reward vault wrapping the sd-DOLA/sUSDe Curve gauge position.
